news.title:
Mankind Pharma shares rose 3% to ₹2,125.10 after acquiring Rivotril brand from Roche for CNS therapies in India.
The acquisition strengthens its neuro CNS portfolio, with Q3FY25 net profit up 7.5% YoY to ₹408.7 crore.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma shares rose 3% to ₹2,125.10 after acquiring Rivotril brand from Roche for CNS therapies in India.
The acquisition strengthens its neuro CNS portfolio, with Q3FY25 net profit up 7.5% YoY to ₹408.7 crore.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma acquires exclusive rights for Rivotril in India.
The move enhances focus on chronic CNS therapies and clonazepam offerings.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma acquires exclusive rights for Rivotril in India.
The move enhances focus on chronic CNS therapies and clonazepam offerings.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma aims early Semaglutide launch post patent expiry in India.
Firm prioritizes Indian market, plans international exploration gradually: MD Rajeev Juneja.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma aims early Semaglutide launch post patent expiry in India.
Firm prioritizes Indian market, plans international exploration gradually: MD Rajeev Juneja.

news.title:
Indian markets stayed flat on Feb 26; Nifty 50 rose 0.07%, Sensex closed flat.
Top gainers: Tejas Networks (+5.2%), KSB (+4.8%), Mankind Pharma (+4.5%), Tata Motors (+3.9%).
news.summary:
Indian markets stayed flat on Feb 26; Nifty 50 rose 0.07%, Sensex closed flat.
Top gainers: Tejas Networks (+5.2%), KSB (+4.8%), Mankind Pharma (+4.5%), Tata Motors (+3.9%).

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Mankind Pharma's credit ratings at AA Stable for NCDs and fund-based limits.
The reaffirmation reflects stability in Mankind Pharma's credit profile with no negative revisions.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Mankind Pharma's credit ratings at AA Stable for NCDs and fund-based limits.
The reaffirmation reflects stability in Mankind Pharma's credit profile with no negative revisions.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma saw a block trade of ~312,486 shares on NSE at Rs. 2073.8.
The total value of the block trade was Rs. 64.8 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Mankind Pharma's operations remained unaffected during a search from Feb 3-8, 2026.
Business activities of BSV continued as usual during the search period.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma's operations remained unaffected during a search from Feb 3-8, 2026.
Business activities of BSV continued as usual during the search period.

news.title:
GST Dept conducted search and seizure at Bharat Serums linked to Mankind Pharma.
Unit operations at the facility continued without disruption during the inspection.
news.summary:
GST Dept conducted search and seizure at Bharat Serums linked to Mankind Pharma.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma to participate in investor conferences on Feb 9-10, 2026.
Events include Systematix's MANTHAN and Axis Capital's Advantage India in Mumbai.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma to participate in investor conferences on Feb 9-10, 2026.

news.title:
Triveni Turbine, JK Lakshmi Cement, Mankind Pharma, Aarti Drugs, and Bharat Coking Coal saw losses up to 9% following weak Q3 results.
Triveni, JK Lakshmi, Mankind, Aarti, and Bharat Coking Coal reported margin contractions, profit declines, or lower realizations impacting market sentiments.
news.summary:
Triveni Turbine, JK Lakshmi Cement, Mankind Pharma, Aarti Drugs, and Bharat Coking Coal saw losses up to 9% following weak Q3 results.
Triveni, JK Lakshmi, Mankind, Aarti, and Bharat Coking Coal reported margin contractions, profit declines, or lower realizations impacting market sentiments.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 11.5% YoY to ₹3,567 Cr.
Adjusted EBITDA margin stood at 25.9%, with chronic segment at 39.3%.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 11.5% YoY to ₹3,567 Cr.
Adjusted EBITDA margin stood at 25.9%, with chronic segment at 39.3%.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma announces ICRA's withdrawal of credit rating for its Rs. 1,500 crore Commercial Paper.
Outstanding ratings include Rs. 5,000 crore NCDs at ICRA AA (Stable) and fund-based limits at ICRA AA (Stable)/A1.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma announces ICRA's withdrawal of credit rating for its Rs. 1,500 crore Commercial Paper.
Outstanding ratings include Rs. 5,000 crore NCDs at ICRA AA (Stable) and fund-based limits at ICRA AA (Stable)/A1.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma schedules an investor call on Feb 3, 2026, at 6 PM IST to discuss Q3 & 9M FY26 results.
Key management, including CEO and CFO, will represent Mankind Pharma; details available on their website.
news.summary:
Mankind Pharma schedules an investor call on Feb 3, 2026, at 6 PM IST to discuss Q3 & 9M FY26 results.

news.title:
Novo Nordisk moves Delhi HC to block Sun Pharma's semaglutide launch, aiming to protect its patents expiring in 2024/2026.
Other players like Cipla, Mankind Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's eye opportunities as the legal battle intensifies.
news.summary:
Novo Nordisk moves Delhi HC to block Sun Pharma's semaglutide launch, aiming to protect its patents expiring in 2024/2026.
Other players like Cipla, Mankind Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's eye opportunities as the legal battle intensifies.

news.title:
Mankind Pharma allotted 46,582 shares to employees under ESOP 2022.
Paid-up share capital rose to 4,128.1 lakh shares; issued at ₹860 each.
news.summary:

Agreement grants Mankind exclusive rights in South Asian territories.
